name: lookup_county_from_location
purpose: Map ZIP/city/county to California county/state/FIPS and statewide coverage level; exact addresses remain blocked unless explicitly session-consented.
output: Jurisdiction { state, county, city?, zip?, fips?, confidence, coverage_level, source_citations[] }
cache: ZIP/city county lookup cache 30 days; never cache exact addresses.

name: get_county_profile
purpose: Return reviewed local or statewide-core California county profile for source-backed benefits prep and handoffs.
output: CountyProfile { coverage_level, offices, phones, food_handoff, shelter_handoff, wic_handoff, source_citations[] }
cache: Static fixture; refresh weekly/manual before demo freeze.

name: retrieve_approved_source
purpose: Fetch metadata and snippets from source snapshot corpus by ID.
cache: Source snapshot corpus; no live request during packet generation.
freshness: Program sources 30–60 days; urgent resources 7 days.

name: search_source_snapshot
purpose: Search approved source corpus by program area, jurisdiction, or need.
input: { query, jurisdiction?, program_area?, source_type?, owner_type?, freshness_state?, coverage_level? }
cache: Local index over source snapshot corpus.

name: get_benefit_program_area
purpose: Return prep/handoff logic for CalFresh, WIC, Medi-Cal/Covered CA, LIHEAP, housing, county services.
output: BenefitProgramArea { status_logic, prep_questions, documents_to_prepare, never_claim, primary_source_ids }

name: match_benefit_paths
purpose: Produce likely benefit areas from household snapshot without determining eligibility.
cache: No cross-session cache; deterministic with synthetic profile.
freshness: Blocked if any required source is stale/retired.

name: find_local_resources
purpose: Return reviewed local resources when curated, otherwise source-backed statewide locator handoffs for California counties.
output: LocalResource[] { name, category, phone, address_or_area, coverage_level, coverage_label, call_before_going, source_citations[] }
cache: Curated HSDS-style fixture plus generated statewide locator handoffs; optional Maps/Places enrichment only for reviewed local resources.
freshness: Urgent resources: 7 days or mark call_before_going/source_refresh_needed.

name: get_healthcare_gov_content
purpose: Retrieve HealthCare.gov public content API article/index objects for health coverage explanations.
cache: 7 days; cached snippets permitted if within freshness window.

name: search_hud_housing_counselors
purpose: Find HUD-approved housing counselors by city/state or lat/long.
cache: 7–30 days for public counselor contacts; show call-before-going.
freshness: Retrieved date shown in source drawer.

name: query_datasf_socrata
purpose: Optional smoke-test or refresh helper for DataSF datasets; not required for runtime packet generation.
freshness: Treat DataSF as as-is; verify with source owner.

name: redact_pii
purpose: Detect and redact SSNs, exact addresses, phone/email, DOB, case numbers, credentials before logs/model calls.
cache: No cache of raw input; log only findings count/type.

name: validate_packet
purpose: Final critic: schema, citations, safety, no prohibited claims.

name: translate_packet
purpose: Translate packet to Spanish using reviewed templates and glossary; no unreviewed high-stakes languages in MVP.

name: export_packet
purpose: Export printable web view, PDF, Markdown, and JSON summary.
cache: Session-only artifact unless user saves locally.
